title: helichrysum raynalianum
intro: Helichrysum raynalianum, also known as the yellow mountain flower or mountain everlast, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum raynalianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures for various health applications.
